title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 354.485 - Rules and regulations authorized
text:
354.485.  Rules and regulations authorized. — The director may promulgate such reasonable rules and regulations in accordance with chapter 536 as are necessary or proper to carry out the provisions of sections 354.400 to 354.636.
(L. 1983 H.B. 127, A.L. 2007 S.B. 66)
